notes: There are no active Maverick protocol-roadmap blockers after current scope decisions. Native ECH remains a tracked upstream dependency with a Cloudflare-fronted WebSocket workaround; GUI/App release work belongs to the separate app product track; external human audit is a post-public/community-review gate. This registry is not a stable, audited, production-readiness, or standardization claim.

non_blocking_tracks.notes: Native Maverick server-side ECH still depends on upstream server-side TLS backend support. The immediate workaround is the already validated Cloudflare-fronted WebSocket carrier, where Cloudflare handles client-facing ECH and Maverick runs as the origin. This is not native server-side ECH.
GUI/App release, Packet Tunnel signing, notarization, and packaging belong to the separate macOS app project. Maverick keeps only SDK, diagnostics, profile, and conformance boundaries.

No formal human audit is expected before initial public as-is release. Third-party AI review is acceptable pre-release input, and human/community review can happen after public release. The project must not claim audited, reviewed, stable, or production-ready status before matching evidence exists.
